title: Is THIS Why UFOs Are Visiting Earth?
summary: A brief discussion exploring theories about why UFOs might be visiting Earth, including speculation about alien communication methods, interdimensional origins, and the possibility that extraterrestrial beings are observing humanity from various realms or timelines.

key_claims.claim: Aliens might create forms resembling familiar things (like ants to ants) to communicate with humans because they are so fundamentally different from us
UFO visitors could be from another planet, underground, interdimensional, from another level of reality, or potentially observing their own past
